rationale: Acting on Review 1 produces the better PR: its finding is exactly correct per the diff (mapsTo_fiber, mapsTo_fiber_symm and fiberHomeomorph all hard-code {b} yet their bodies only need map_proj and work verbatim for arbitrary s, with eq_comm disappearing in the general case) and directly improves generality, whereas Review 2's approval leaves an avoidable specialization in the core API. No other findings exist.
